The '''''Starhook Ten''''' was a modified space truck owned by [[Shug Ninx]].

Ninx used the ''Starhook Ten'' to help evacuate [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] from [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] when their [[Battle of the Emperor's Citadel|mission]] was met by stiff resistance. ''Starhook Ten'' would later assist Rebel forces during their [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|evacuation]] from [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Operation Shadow Hand]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Salvager Three]]'' could be another name for ''Starhook Ten'', given that both ships seem to be identical. Additionally, Ninx and [[Salla Zend]] enter Byss with the former while using false codes and leave with the latter. However, a more likely explanation may be that Ninx had left the ''Starhook Ten'' at Byss prior to the events depicted in ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' or that Salvager Three was modified using what was left of the [[Starlight Intruder]] to become Starhook Ten as ''[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire]]'' would suggest.

The ''Starhook Ten'' is mis-identified as the '''''Starhook VII''''' in ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''.
